name: github
title: GitHub
description: Work with issues, pull requests, manage workflows, search repositories and stay on top of notifications
author: knoopx

commands.name: issues
commands.title: My Issues
commands.subtitle: List your issues
commands.description: List issues created by you, assigned to you or mentioning you.

commands.name: workflowRuns
commands.title: Workflow Runs
commands.subtitle: List your workflow runs
commands.description: List workflow runs created by you, assigned to you or mentioning you.

commands.name: createIssue
commands.title: Create Issue
commands.subtitle: Create a new issue
commands.description: Create a new issue in a repository.

commands.name: createPullRequest
commands.title: Create Pull Request
commands.subtitle: Create a new pull request
commands.description: Create a new pull request in a repository.

commands.name: pullRequests
commands.title: My Pull Requests
commands.subtitle: List your pull requests
commands.description: List pull requests created by you, assigned to you or mentioning you.

commands.name: myRepositories
commands.title: My Repositories
commands.subtitle: Search in your repositories
commands.description: List your public and private repositories

commands.name: searchRepositories
commands.title: Search Repositories
commands.subtitle: Search in repositories
commands.description: Search in your public or private repositories by name.

preferences.name: personalAccessToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Your GitHub personal access token. Required scopes: notifications, repo, project, read:org, read:user.

preferences.name: numberOfResults
preferences.title: Number of search results
preferences.description: For searching repositories, issues, discussions or pull requests, this is the number of results to request.

preferences.name: defaultIssueFilter
preferences.title: Default Issue Filter
preferences.description: The default filter to use when opening the issues command.

preferences.name: defaultRepositoryFilter
preferences.title: Default Repository Filter
preferences.description: The default filter to use when opening the repositories command.
